subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from Him Who was in the hands of the enemies in the path of God, the Most High, the Most Exalted, and upon Whom descended [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من الذی کان بین یدی الاعدا فی سبیل الله العلی الاعلی و ورد علیه
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @chastisement and requital
